# Skillmatch

> Skillmatch is the employer-side platform of a two-sided skill-based hiring marketplace. Enter a job title or skills, we match you with qualified candidates in seconds. No resumes to screen, no unqualified applicants. Candidates ranked by skill match percentage.

## What makes Skillmatch different

- **Skill-first hiring** — post a role, our AI auto-generates the required skills taxonomy. No manual job description writing.
- **100% match filter** — only see candidates who meet your required skills. No unqualified applicants in your inbox.
- **Anonymous candidates** — reduce bias. Candidates are identified by skill match score + anonymous handle until you unlock them.
- **Required vs. optional toggle** — tap a skill pill to move it between "must-have" and "nice-to-have."
- **Auto-pay conversion** — enter salary per year, month, or hour — the platform converts automatically.
- **Pay per unlock** — free to post, free to browse matches. Pay only when you unlock a candidate to contact.

## Who is it for

- Recruiters and hiring managers at SMBs and startups
- HR teams tired of resume screening
- Founders hiring their first employees
- Healthcare, trades, tech, and services companies hiring skill-based roles

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://skillmatch-red.vercel.app/): Value props + comparison to traditional job boards
- [Post a Job](https://skillmatch-red.vercel.app/post-job): Type role → AI auto-populates skills → see candidates
- [Candidates](https://skillmatch-red.vercel.app/candidates): Ranked candidate list with match breakdown

## Key vocabulary

- **Required skills** (teal pills) — must-have to qualify
- **Optional skills** (green pills) — nice-to-have, bumps ranking
- **Match score** — percentage of required + optional skills a candidate has
- **Unlock** — reveal a candidate's contact details (billing trigger)
- **Anonymous handle** — candidate identifier (e.g. "KeeTo325") shown until unlocked

## Partner platform

Skillmatch is the **employer side** of a two-sided skill marketplace. The job-seeker side is [PayRanker](https://workpath-iota.vercel.app), where workers enter their skills and see jobs sorted by pay. Candidates on Skillmatch are PayRanker users who have opted to receive employer contact.

## Tech stack

- Next.js 14 (App Router, TypeScript)
- Tailwind CSS
- Neon PostgreSQL (shared with PayRanker — same user pool)
- Neo4j Aura (shared skill graph)
- Claude Sonnet 4 (role classification + skill taxonomy generation)
- Capacitor (iOS app wrapper)
- Vercel (hosting)

## API

- `POST /api/employer/roles` — suggest role variants + required/optional skills for a typed role
- `POST /api/employer/candidates` — return ranked candidates matching a set of required + optional skills

## Contact

- Website: https://skillmatch-red.vercel.app
- Job seeker side: https://workpath-iota.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/aprem01/skillmatch
